consumed.shape: persisted shared-input bundle JSON consumed through --bundle-path and bootstrapped by bootstrap.init when starting from zero local state
bounded transcribed voice-note JSON object consumed through --payload-json or --payload-path by submit.voice_note

produced.notes: submit.hydration, submit.meal, and submit.voice_note regenerate both the dated and latest artifacts on success.
recommendation.create writes exactly one day-scoped recommendation artifact and fails closed on malformed payloads, scope mismatches, invalid context artifacts, or ungrounded evidence refs.

args.name: date

recommendation.create.description: Write one validated day-scoped recommendation artifact grounded in one scoped daily context artifact.

payload_shape.notes: All evidence_refs must already exist in the referenced agent_readable_daily_context and the payload user_id/date must match that context scope.
